flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hawaii Pacific University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (42.5% → 34.9%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Hawaii Pacific University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (31.1% → 25.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hawaii Pacific University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.0k → $34.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hawaii Pacific University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.0k → $34.4k).
